no_imports_diff.description: Git diff with no import statements
no_imports_diff.reason: No imports or references to dependencies in the diff

dynamic_imports_only.description: Git diff with only dynamic imports (require/import statements)
dynamic_imports_only.reason: Dynamic imports prevent static analysis of which packages are used

aliased_imports.description: Git diff with aliased or namespace imports
aliased_imports.reason: Aliased imports are used in code but require deeper analysis to detect

mixed_severity_levels.description: Multiple packages with different severity vulnerabilities
mixed_severity_levels.expected_findings_after_filter: All critical and high should be included; medium depends on threshold; low filtered out

large_diff_near_limit.expected_behavior: Should process successfully but close to limit
large_diff_near_limit.reason: Tests boundary condition near 500KB diff size limit

no_source_files_diff.description: Diff that only changes non-source files
no_source_files_diff.diff_content:
diff --git a/package.json b/package.json
index 1234567..abcdefg 100644
--- a/package.json
+++ b/package.json
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 {
   "name": "my-app",
-  "version": "1.0.0",
+  "version": "1.0.1",
   "dependencies": {
     "lodash": "^4.17.21"

diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
index 1234567..abcdefg 100644
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
-# Old Title
+# New Title
 
 Some documentation update
no_source_files_diff.reason: Config and documentation changes don't reveal code-level reachability
